examples: Later, Reactionist writers took the view that frontier women were lonely, displaced persons in a hostile milieu that intensified the worst aspects of gender relations.
They stayed, safe and happy, within their own social milieu.
Juste-milieu is the topmost aesthetic ideals.
Out of this port-hopping, footloose milieu stepped the most influential traveller in Western history.
What usually goes unexplained in these studies is exactly what creativity means in a corporate milieu.
